registry_disposition_note: This registry indexes the six accepted frozen One-Perfect-Tile JSON Schemas and their repository implementation footprint. It does NOT claim product-condition acceptance, contract freeze, Gate B review outcome, or PRODUCT_COMPLETE status. Product state remains PRODUCT_INCOMPLETE (1 of 11) independent of this registry's contents.

schemas.semantic_purpose: Top-of-package customer-facing manifest: package identity, bound payload hashes (geometry, feature metadata, provenance receipt, optional design export / layer license matrix / join contract refs), product completeness state with eleven-condition evidence gate, synthetic-vs-real disambiguation, Shape A source posture, exact Shape A exclusion set.
schemas.dependency_mechanism: content-hash reference by const schema_version field in a nested *_ref object; no JSON Schema $ref crosses file boundaries

schemas.semantic_purpose: Per-feature (per structure-segment) metadata: identity-neutral feature_id, geometry-derived measurements with conditional null-meaning, geometry confidence / footprint provenance (LiDAR-only), mandatory per-feature claim-tier set, GLB node binding with the CF-05 node_name==feature_id conformance gate, document-level Shape B exclusions.
schemas.dependency_mechanism: none (leaf schema); referenced BY tile_package_manifest via feature_metadata_ref

schemas.semantic_purpose: Customer-facing provenance receipt: source identity, rights posture, CRS/transforms, software/design identities, algorithm config, output hashes, validation suite, claim tiers, exact Shape A exclusions, C12 dataset-level accuracy status (PENDING honest-negative permitted, MEASURED requires bound RMSE evidence), unresolved questions, independent acceptance, standards posture.
schemas.dependency_mechanism: none (leaf schema); referenced BY tile_package_manifest via provenance_receipt_ref and BY design_export_manifest via rights_and_provenance_refs.provenance_receipt_ref

schemas.semantic_purpose: Design Edition dual-track export manifest binding completion Condition 10: D1 editable mesh (OBJ+MTL), D2 SKP native/importable path, D3 attributed footprint vectors, GeoTIFF terrain, both tracks linked by stable feature_id, rights/provenance refs, viewer access. Net-new schema (not inherited from a prior contract revision).
schemas.dependency_mechanism: content-hash reference by const schema_version field in rights_and_provenance_refs.*

schemas.semantic_purpose: Machine-readable rights matrix (artifact C11): per-layer source, rights holder, license/terms, permitted uses, redistribution/attribution/share-alike/modification posture, unresolved legal questions (including open counsel question 9), and Core-vs-outside-Core relationship. Records rights facts only; draws no legal conclusion. Net-new schema.
schemas.dependency_mechanism: none (leaf schema); referenced BY tile_package_manifest via layer_license_matrix_ref and BY design_export_manifest via rights_and_provenance_refs.layer_license_matrix_ref

schemas.semantic_purpose: Generic Core join contract (artifact C3): stable identifiers, coordinate-reference behavior, horizontal/vertical units and datum, generic join semantics (buyer joins to Atlantid substrate), deterministic compatibility expectations, version/continuity rules, and a machine-asserted core_boundary block prohibiting source-specific join recipes or externally derived join tables inside Core. Net-new schema.
schemas.dependency_mechanism: none (leaf schema); referenced BY tile_package_manifest via join_contract_ref
